title: Magnificently Charred Australian Prawns Skewers
description: A show-stopping Australian dish featuring charred prawns, pillowy puff pastry, and a dairy-free friendly twist, perfect for impressing guests.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated prawns onto skewers, leaving a small space between each prawn.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a large rectangle.
Brush the pastry with a little olive oil and cut into long strips.
Wrap each prawn skewer with a strip of puff pastry, brushing the edges with a little water to seal.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pastry is golden brown and the prawns are cooked through.
